experiment: F-CAT1 FMEA refresh — S410 (7 sessions post-S403)
expect: 17→18+ FMs (NAT predicts new discovery). ≥1 MINIMAL→ADEQUATE upgrade for severity-1 FMs.
actual: 17→18 FMs. 1 new (FM-18: concurrent lesson number collision). FM-01 upgraded MINIMAL→ADEQUATE (mass-staging guard added to check.sh). All 17 prior defense layers INTACT.
diff: Expected ≥1 new FM — got 1 (FM-18, observed this session: L-901 overwritten by concurrent session). Expected ≥1 upgrade — got 1 (FM-01). NAT prediction ~S430 not due yet but pattern confirmed: system-design FMs continue emerging.

failure_modes.name: Mass git staging via git add -A
failure_modes.change: UPGRADED MINIMAL→ADEQUATE: added mass-staging guard (>100 files) in check.sh. Now 2 auto (deletion guard + staging guard) + 1 rule.

failure_modes.name: Concurrent lesson number collision
failure_modes.change: NEW. Observed S410: L-901 created by two sessions simultaneously with different content. Last writer wins. Defense: 1 rule (CLAUDE.md: check git log before writing). 0 automated detection or prevention.

nat_analysis.s410_result: FM-18 at S410 — 20 sessions early. NAT interval continues shrinking as system complexity grows.
nat_analysis.pattern_shift: S403 pattern (infrastructure→system-design) continues. FM-18 is concurrency-level: emerges only under high-session load (N>=2 writing same file). Failure modes now stratified: infrastructure (hardened) → system-design (emerging S403) → concurrency (emerging S410).
nat_analysis.next_prediction: ~S430. Most probable: (1) measurement drift (L-820 stale observers at 63-session staleness), (2) citation graph integrity (N>900 lessons), (3) tooling entropy (unreferenced tools accumulate).
nat_analysis.nat_accuracy: 4/4 cycles predicted FM emergence. Timing overestimates persist: adjusted from 50→30 session intervals. Recurrence is accelerating (S381→S403 = 22s, S403→S410 = 7s).

hardening_next.action: Add lesson-number allocation locking: claim.py claim memory/lessons/L-NNN.md before writing, or use atomic file creation
Add 3rd layer (rule) to reach ADEQUATE. Document recovery procedure in OPERATIONS.md.
Wire genesis_hash.py verification into orient.py session start
Add automated git index health check (git fsck --no-full in orient.py)
